items.degree: B.Sc. Eng. (Hons) in Civil and Environmental Engineering
items.institution: Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna, Sri Lanka
items.description: A comprehensive undergraduate degree in Civil and Environmental Engineering with academic exposure to structural engineering, geotechnical engineering, environmental engineering, transportation engineering, surveying, construction management and digital construction technologies. This background has developed my technical knowledge, analytical thinking and understanding of modern engineering practices.

items.degree: G.C.E. Advanced Level - Physical Science Stream
items.description: Completed G.C.E. Advanced Level studies in the Physical Science stream, including Combined Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry, developing a strong foundation in analytical thinking, problem solving and engineering related scientific concepts.
Completed and continuing professional learning related to BIM, CAD design, digital construction, project management and engineering software applications.
